item.text: I’ll compare the new metric evidence with the current rollback gate and make one targeted refinement.

item.aggregated_output:
# New metric evidence

Rollback begins 18 minutes after the failure signal. The operational target is at most
5 minutes.
# Deployment plan

Deploy after approval.

## Rollback decision gate

Approval must name one deployment lead as the rollback owner and list the mandatory
post-deployment health checks. If either is missing, do not deploy. If any mandatory
health check fails, the named rollback owner must start rollback immediately; otherwise,
continue the deployment.

# Deployment plan

Deploy after approval.

## Rollback decision gate

Approval must name one deployment lead as the rollback owner and list the mandatory
post-deployment health checks. If either is missing, do not deploy. If any mandatory
health check fails, record the failure-signal time and the named rollback owner must
start rollback within 5 minutes of that signal; otherwise, continue the deployment.

item.text: Refined [plan.md](/private/tmp/mindthus-n3b-20260719-2cf45620/thread/plan.md) to timestamp the failure signal and require rollback to begin within the 5-minute operational target.
